comment.body:
Just thinking out loud. I had 1 NVDA $110 call I was holding overnight. I had a target of $115 for NVDA. And given Alma’s analysis, CPI print, and overnight price action, I was keen that we’d be at high risk for an early morning spike and decay.

So I set a limit order, based on looking at where options closed relative to where mine was relative to current price.

However, price exceeded my target, went up to $116.75, and I missed out on $200 profit.

Obviously nobody will ever catch 100%, but in retrospect, I should’ve put a stop limit order on with profit I was comfortable taking, and watched price action to exit later on that spike.

Options are incredibly tough instruments to trade, and I am no expert at all. But just with timing my exit and entrance by 5 minutes each way, I could’ve doubled my profit by another $300. Just shows how incredible Alma is with her timing and ability to trade 0DTE’s and other options.
